subscribe.title: Join Our Pantry
subscribe.description: Subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to receive new recipes and news from the farm.
subscribe.checkEmailToast: Check your email — we've sent a confirmation letter
subscribe.pendingToast: Confirmation letter already sent — check your email
subscribe.errorToast: Failed to subscribe. Please try again later.

confirmed.title: Subscription Confirmed
confirmed.description: Thank you, now you will be the first to know about new recipes and news.
